summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AGM Sales Salary Calculator web application. All core features working correctly including dashboard, employee management, attendance upload, configuration, and reports.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation links occasionally have visibility issues requiring force clicks

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with stats cards (Total Employees, Total Salary, Total OT, Zero Salary)
Dashboard shows wizard progress with 4 steps (Employee Master, Upload Attendance, Configure Rules, View Reports)
Navigation sidebar works - all 5 links accessible (Dashboard, Employees, Attendance, Configuration, Reports)
Employee Master page: Add Employee modal opens and works correctly
Employee Master page: Employee table displays correctly with added employee
Employee Master page: Import Excel and Export Excel buttons visible
Attendance Upload page: Drag-drop zone visible with file format instructions
Configuration page: All 8 config sections visible (Attendance Detection, Working Hours, Overtime, Half Day, Sunday Working, Holiday Rules, Sandwich Rule, Other Rules)
Configuration page: Toggle switches work correctly
Configuration page: Shows warning when no attendance uploaded
Reports page: Shows alert when no calculation results
Employee CRUD operations work (successfully added Test Employee with code 101)
Search functionality works in Employee Master
Proper AGM SALES branding displayed throughout application
